programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Threads Of Gold
programme.desc: People In the jute mills near Kolkata, where harsh conditions persist, the threatened industry and its environmental toll unfold, raising the question of whether change can emerge from hardship.

programme.title: Shepherds Around The World
programme.desc: People Mark Michel and his team embark on a global journey, immersing themselves in the lives of five diverse pastoral communities to explore their unique cultures, challenges, and enduring traditions.

programme.title: Four Seasons In The Forests
programme.desc: Nature Different creatures interact with nature; some appear and others hide each season, providing variety in the forest.

programme.title: The Battle For Survival In The Mediterranean
programme.desc: Nature Despite the dangers and threats to which marine creatures are exposed daily in the Mediterranean Sea due to factory and farm waste, these creatures struggle to survive through adaptation and biological evolution.

programme.title: In Love With Wild Horses
programme.desc: People An amazing journey through the enchanting nature of the North American continent, home to the Tsoulcotine people, known as the horse people because of their timeless and unique bond with horses.

programme.title: Arab Digital Community
programme.desc: Sciences Examines the impact of digital content on Arab society by following top content creators and how they shape the audience's awareness, questions, and values.

programme.title: Arabic Radio
programme.desc: History Delving into the history of Arab radio, highlighting its role in conveying the voice of the people, shaping their consciousness, and expressing their revolutions and demands. It also presents the role of radio in communication and preserving the heritage and art of the diverse Arab peoples.

programme.title: The Diabetes Battle In Australia
programme.desc: Fitness & Health An Australian physician and a physiologist are revolutionizing the world of diseases by presenting a scientifically based diet that can eliminate type 2 diabetes.

programme.title: Mysteries Of The Modern Science
programme.desc: Sciences Despite the progressive scientific developments in many fields, science remains baffled by unexpected cosmic phenomena such as solar storms. Research into many mysteries continues, but science must be prepared to deal with the discoveries' consequences.

With so many rivals, no one's chances look good. Aasmaan Bhardwaj, Aasmaan Bhardwaj, Vishal Bhardwaj, Tabu, Arjun Kapoor, Naseeruddin Shah, Konkona Sen Sharma, Kumud Mishra.

programme.title: Parineetii
programme.desc: Two loyal friends, who are known for their unconditional support of each other in all circumstances, are confronted with a complicated scenario after both end up married to the same man. Aanchal Sahu, Ankur Verma.

programme.title: Parineetii
programme.desc: Two loyal friends, who are known for their unconditional support of each other in all circumstances, are confronted with a complicated scenario after both end up married to the same man. Aanchal Sahu, Ankur Verma.

programme.title: Parineetii
programme.desc: Two loyal friends, who are known for their unconditional support of each other in all circumstances, are confronted with a complicated scenario after both end up married to the same man. Aanchal Sahu, Ankur Verma.

programme.title: Mannat
programme.desc: Drama Mannat, a gifted chef, works under a boss who is unknowingly her biological mother, and as her dreams for the future collide with the hidden truths of her past, fate begins to reorder her life. Mukta Dhond.

programme.title: Daddy Is Here
programme.desc: When Hesham loses his job in the COVID-19 pandemic, he becomes a stay-at-home dad, relying on his wife's income. Faced with financial struggles and his daughter deeming him unnecessary, he resolves to apply an unexpected solution. Akram Hosny, Nisreen Amin.

programme.title: Our Father's House
programme.desc: Two divorced sisters live with their children at their father's house, where they face many problems because of their failure in raising their children. Hayat Al Fahad, Soad Abd Allah.

programme.title: Crystal
programme.desc: A severe conflict arises between Alia, a famous fashion designer, and Fay, the daughter of her house guard, who is trying to become like her. It gets worse when they both love the same person, Dr. Jawad. Mahmoud Nasr, Bamila Alkik, Stephanie Atala, Khaled Shabbat, Leen Gherra, Hakan Arslan, Lobna Meshlah, Pamela El kik.

programme.title: Complex 75
programme.desc: Relationships become intertwined between five families who live inside one of the upscale residential complexes in the city of Riyadh, and their dreams and ambitions control them, which may cause them problems. Tamer Bsyony, Ghada Al Molla, Abd El Monaem Riyad, Ingy Salama, Sarah El Harbi, Nada Ibrahim, Rana Gobran, Ghada Al Mulla, Rana Jobran.

programme.title: Lost In Someone's Love
programme.desc: Sai Joshi dreams of joining the Nagpur Medical College and becoming a doctor one day, but her steps are hindered when her family forces her to marry an IPS officer who is in love with another woman, so they make a secret deal that comforts both of them. Ayesha Singh, Neil Bhatt, Aishwarya Sharma Bhatt, Sanjivani Amit Takkar, Kishori Shahane, Jaydeep Sen, Rajesh Chawla.

programme.title: Younis, Fadda's Son
programme.desc: Younis, a businessman from the upper of Egypt, controls his town in every way possible even the suspicious ones. No one can confront him until they start doubting about his pedigree. Amr Saad, Riham Haggag.

programme.title: The Pit
programme.desc: Despite leaving his love behind and starting fresh, the surprising presence of Yamac's mother disturbs all of his feelings asking him to return and aid the family legacy. Aras Bulut Iynemli, Erkan Kolcak Kostendil.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: Not only does coincidence bring together the mysterious businessman Aslan and psychotherapist Devin, but they also share the same psychological traumas caused by their families. Therefore, they try to establish a life together despite the suffering. Kivanç Tatlitug, Serenay Sarikaya, Nur Surer, Nejat Isler, Canan Erguder, Ahmet Katiksiz, Hakan Bonomo, Kivanc Tatlitug.

programme.title: إش إش موس

programme.desc: S1 E16 يوجه رجب تهديدا صريحا لمختار: الاقتراب من إش إش يعني نهايته. في هذه الأثناء، تصر إش إش على العثور على بوشكاش قبل عودة رجب. أما عبد العاطي، فيبتز إش إش لانتزاع الملف الأحمر منها.\r.
programme.title: إش إش موس

programme.desc: S1 E17 أثناء شجار حاد بينه وبين لبنى، تهدد زلة لسان من مختار بكشف سر دفين. يحضر عبد العاطي لإش إش مساعدة منزلية تتجسس في وقت لاحق على حديثها مع صفاء.
programme.title: إش إش موس

programme.title: صباحك مصري

programme.desc: S1 E1 تحاول نرجس المحافظة على زوجها بشتى الوسائل لكنه يحلم بالزواج من دهبية. يسعى طليق دهيبة إلى ردها. تطمح فاطيمة للزواج من خلال استخدام مواقع التواصل الاجتماعي.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: جدول البرامج غير متاح.
programme.title: جدول البرامج غير متاح

programme.desc: S1 E2 يتشاجر رأفت مع دهبية ويحاول الضغط عليها للرجوع إليه ولكن الحاج أنس يتدخل ويدافع عنها. أما باسم، فيبدي امتعاضه من تصرفات زوج أمه ويعتبره سارقاً لميراث أبيه.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E3 يتسابق أنس ورأفت لطلب ود دهبية ويواصلان محاولاتهما دون يأس كما تسعى دهبية لمساعدة سلمى في تحقيق مشروعها ولكن تحدث مشادة كلامية بين سلمى وباسم بعد اكتشافه استئجارها لإحدى ممتلكات والدته دون علمه. من ناحية ثانية، تحاول سلمى إقناع أخيها بالهرب.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E4 يحاول حسن التودد إلى دهبية ولكن حظه لن يكون أفضل من حظ أنس ورأفت، فيما يحاول طارق الحصول على وظيفة ويرفض العمل مع والده. أما عز، فيتقصى سراً حول جريمة القتل.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E5 توشك جهود رأفت أن تثمر، وتبدأ دهبية بالتفكير باقتراحاته. يخبر حسن والده برغبته بالزواج من دهبية. أما باسم، فيطرح على والدته فكرة بيع ممتلكاتها.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E21 بعد انتهاء قصة الحب العاصف التي كانت تجمعه مع حسناء، يدخل فارس في حالة صدمة ويقرر إدارة عمل تحوم حوله الشبهات.
programme.title: الحصان الأسود الموس

programme.desc: S1 E8 تسعى دهبية للتقرب من ابنتها سارة، فيما يبوح حسن لرشاد برغبته في الزواج من دهبية، بينما تحدث مناقشة حادة بين نرجس وباسم بسبب رفضها التحدث مع الحاج أنس حول بيع البيت والحمام. من ناحية ثانية، تحترق مكتبة حكيم بعد عودة ابنته من السفر.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E21 يقدم رجب عرضا ممتعا للحاضرين...ومذلا لمختار! تتحول لبنى من معتدية إلى ضحية ثانية لإش إش. ما إن تخمد إش إش نيران الخطر القادم من بوشكاش، حتى يداهمها خطر أعظم من حيث لا تحتسب.\r.
programme.title: إش إش موس

programme.desc: S1 E12 سرايا عابدين الموس.

programme.desc: S1 E22 ينجو المخرج حاتم من محاولة تهدف إلى قتله، فيما تحاول ماهي معرفة السبب وراء اتهامه لها، أما حسناء فتتشاجر مع فارس أمام الضابط عمرو.
programme.title: الحصان الأسود موس

programme.desc: S1 E9 يكتشف باسم أن الحاج أنس استغل توكيل زوجته له وقام بالاستيلاء على البيت والحمام الشعبي، فيطلع والدته على ذلك. من ناحية ثانية، وبعد موافقة دهبية على الرجوع إلى طليقها رأفت، ترفض ابنتها ذلك.
programme.title: الحلال الموس

programme.desc: S1 E22 تنقل إش إش على عجلة إلى المستشفى. يؤسس بوشكاش مشروعا جديدا. يعيد رجب وفرج النظر بعلاقتهما.\r.
programme.title: إش إش موس

programme.title: Kick
programme.desc: A guy who has a weird lifestyle, is looking forward to adding thrill and pleasure to every work he does till he becomes a thief. Sajid Nadiadwala.

programme.title: Phir Teri Kahani Yaad Aye
programme.desc: A Movie director is addicted to alcohol. He goes to sanatorium to get healed. So he meets there a girl suffers from deep mental problems. He gets healed but she moves to another hospital specialized in her case. Unfortunately, everyone thinks that she is killed in a fire that occurred there. But she's not. Pooja Bhatt, Rahul Roy.

programme.title: Dayaalu
programme.desc: Magic may help a family overcome many temporal and spatial barriers to find themselves living in different generations. Nazir Herekar.

programme.title: The Miracle
programme.desc: A determined teacher tends not to abandon a secluded village in desperate need of a school as he gradually builds a conscious community with the help of a disabled man with whom he has an unlikely bond. Talat Bulut, Mert Turak, Mahsun Kirmizigül, Ali Sürmeli, Senay Gurler, Mahsun Kirmizigül, Mahsun Kirmizigül.

programme.title: When We Met
programme.desc: Two old friends dream of marrying their children from each other whom love knows its way to them, but circumstances separate them and the beloved seeks revenge. Muzammil Desai.

programme.title: Fukrey Returns
programme.desc: A young woman decides to seek revenge after her release from prison. She sets a plan to turn her four friends' lives upside-down. And her friends never imagine that their smooth life will change. Pulkit Samrat, Varun Sharma, Ali Fazal, Manjot Singh, Richa Chadha, Mrighdeep Lamba, Vipul Vig, Mrighdeep Lamba.

programme.title: Zee Connect
programme.desc: Stay connected with every update happens in the region. It brings you exclusive interviews and latest news about fashion, gadgets and celebrities.

programme.title: Come On My Son
programme.desc: Ali, a fisherman, devoted his life to his young son, Efe. Efe was the only son of Ali who was in this life. Efe is different from other children. Efe, who has a communication problem. Busra Develi, Alihan Türkdemir, Kivanc Tatlitug.

programme.title: Zee Connect
programme.desc: Stay connected with every update happens in the region. It brings you exclusive interviews and latest news about fashion, gadgets and celebrities.

programme.title: Kartik Calling Kartik
programme.desc: Karthik, a quiet individual facing ridicule, receives a sudden phone call from an unknown person, offering him a chance to revolutionize his life. Farhan Akhtar, Deepika Padukone, Ram Kapoor, Shefali Shah, Vivan Bhatena, Vijay Lalwani, Vijay Lalwani.

programme.title: Fukrey Returns
programme.desc: A young woman decides to seek revenge after her release from prison. She sets a plan to turn her four friends' lives upside-down. And her friends never imagine that their smooth life will change. Pulkit Samrat, Varun Sharma, Ali Fazal, Manjot Singh, Richa Chadha, Mrighdeep Lamba, Vipul Vig, Mrighdeep Lamba.

programme.title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
programme.desc: A brother and sister are orphaned when their parents are killed by a criminal on the run. She is raised by a wealthy family while he grows up to be a thief. Years later they reunite to bring the killer, now a respected figure, to justice. Anil Kapoor, Sridevi , Anupam Kher, Paresh Rawal, Jackie Shroff, Satish Kaushik, Javed Akhtar, Sridevi.

programme.title: Maharakshak
programme.desc: Three women are falsely accused of a crime, drawing a retired lawyer back into the courtroom. As he fights to clear their names, he confronts a system built to silence them. Ajith Kumar, Shraddha Srinath, Abhirami Venkatachalam, Andrea Tariang, V. Jayaprakash, H. Vinoth, H. Vinoth.

programme.title: Come On My Son
programme.desc: Ali, a fisherman, devoted his life to his young son, Efe. Efe was the only son of Ali who was in this life. Efe is different from other children. Efe, who has a communication problem. Busra Develi, Alihan Türkdemir, Kivanc Tatlitug.

programme.title: Kartik Calling Kartik
programme.desc: Karthik, a quiet individual facing ridicule, receives a sudden phone call from an unknown person, offering him a chance to revolutionize his life. Farhan Akhtar, Deepika Padukone, Ram Kapoor, Shefali Shah, Vivan Bhatena, Vijay Lalwani, Vijay Lalwani.

programme.title: Article 15
programme.desc: An honorable police officer launches an attack over crime and discrimination in an Indian rural heartland. Ayushmann Khurrana, Manoj Pahwa, Nassar, Mohammed Zeeshan Ayyub, Sayani Gupta, Anubhav Sinha, Gaurav Solanki.

programme.title: My Fat Wife
programme.desc: An overweight girl gets used to the constant rejection of the opposite sex because of her outward appearance, but when her path crosses with a wrestling superstar, she realizes that love knows no law. Rytasha Rathore, Prince Narula.

programme.title: When We Met
programme.desc: Two old friends dream of marrying their children from each other whom love knows its way to them, but circumstances separate them and the beloved seeks revenge. Muzammil Desai.

programme.title: Silence
programme.desc: As soon as Arvind is assigned as a judge at the Karnataka High Court, his life turns upside down while attempting to do his job right. Mammootty , Anoop Menon, Pallavi Purohit, Raghavan, Joy Mathew, V.K. Prakash, Y.V. Rajesh, Mammootty.

programme.title: Shirin Farhad Ki Toh Nikal Padi
